headline: Focus and Concentration Techniques
description: Sustained concentration is a trainable skill eroded by modern distraction culture. Core techniques: Pomodoro (25min focus + 5min break), deep work blocks (2-4h uninterrupted sessions), flow state optimization (clear goals + challenge-skill balance). Environmental design: digital minimalism, dedicated workspace, single-tasking over multitasking. Attention is a finite resource requiring deliberate management.

citation.name: Deep Work: Rules for Focused Success in a Distracted World (Cal Newport)
